comments.author: @dianecavaness7590
comments.text: Since you made two major errors in the first minute, I think I'll pass. (Volcanoes don't smoke. Oregon has only one National Park.)

comments.author: @adamselene9264
comments.text: Whenever I hear very loud vehicles here, generally illegal exhausts blasting noise over a mile, or bass thumping "subwoofers", I think "asshole police".  This may seem like an odd reaction, but the reason is I know this is illegal and it is happening constantly and the police deliberately do not enforce the law.  Police exist to serve the rich and powerful only and do not "protect and serve" the public.  They gaslight and say it is hard to enforce, though it is actually easy.  The gaslighting is illogical, since the work police actually do is harder than the enforcement they do not do and claim is hard.  They have an agenda to screw the quality of life here, and Oregon sucks as a result.  So many bad things here, they act like the problems are intractable, yet somehow these same problems are solved in other countries around the world.

comments.author: @stevedolan5065
comments.text: One of my first  camping trips was to Brookings…I don’t ever remember seeing the sun out over the many times I’ve been there. But the whole coast is beautiful. Crater Lake, Mount Hood…such fantastic places. Everyone should visit them at least once.

comments.text: Visit during Spring, Summer, and Fall. Winters in Northern California, and the Pacific Northwest can be brutal and not for the city slickers. It's for the nature lovers, and outdoorsy folks
